name: Teaching Candidate Discovery
deliverable: candidate teaching list with source rationale and target paths
acceptance: candidate teachings are tied to real migrated decisions
each candidate notes whether it is safe, manual-review, or unknown
candidate set distinguishes architecture rules from one-off repo details

name: Teaching File Generation
acceptance: each teaching references the new Skills architecture rather than legacy command authority
unsafe or ambiguous teachings are marked for manual review
no generated teaching claims more certainty than the evidence supports

name: Dry-Run Adoption
deliverable: dry-run report showing how generated teachings would land and where they would conflict
acceptance: dry run does not silently rewrite authoritative surfaces
report covers drift, duplication, and conflict risks
report names files that would change under a real adoption

name: Migration Feedback
deliverable: feedback report describing how to improve future migration plans, lugs, and workstreams
acceptance: feedback ties back to actual dry-run findings
weak assumptions in the original migration plan are called out

name: Final Teaching Triage
deliverable: final triage summary separating ready teachings from deferred ones
acceptance: ready, manual-review, and defer buckets are explicit
the output is usable as input to a future real adoption run
